title: cyperus benghalensis
intro: Cyperus benghalensis, also known as the Gobee or Tulari, is a type of sedge plant native to tropical Asia and Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus benghalensis include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
